mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LESSON (trainer_id, client_id, start_time, end_time, status, notes, lesson_date) VALUES (#{trainerId}, #{clientId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{lessonDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, client_id, start_time, end_time, status, notes, lesson_date, created_at FROM LESSON WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} ORDER BY lesson_date DESC
SELECT id, trainer_id, client_id, start_time, end_time, status, notes, lesson_date, created_at FROM LESSON WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY lesson_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE LESSON SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, client_id, start_time, end_time, status, notes, lesson_date, created_at FROM LESSON WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE LESSON SET notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, client_id, start_time, end_time, status, notes, lesson_date, created_at FROM LESSON WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND lesson_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND status != '취소' ORDER BY lesson_date ASC, start_time ASC
